prompt: SUBJECT: a single ornamental peony bloom with leaves - petals pure WHITE and soft blush-pink only, deeper rose at the center, absolutely NO yellow, cream, or lime tones anywhere in the bloom; fresh medium-green leaves spreading symmetrically left and right in a wide horizontal composition suitable as a bottom ornament. STYLE: hand-tinted chromolithograph engraving matching the attached voucher's peony illustration - warm ochre-sepia linework, flat natural color washes, no photorealism. FRAMING (critical): the ENTIRE bloom and every leaf tip must sit fully inside the frame with a wide empty margin of at least 15 percent on ALL four sides; nothing may touch or be cut off by any edge. GROUND: fully transparent background, nothing else; no text, no border, no shadow, no yellow or gold color cast.
